seo.metaTitle: Empire Roofing — Cape Town's #1 Roofing & Waterproofing Specialists
seo.metaDescription: Expert roofing, waterproofing and building envelope solutions across the Western Cape. Free inspections. Same-day quotes. 2-year written guarantee on every job.

testimonials.quote: Empire Roofing fixed a persistent leak that two other contractors couldn't solve. Professional, fast and the guarantee gave us total peace of mind.
testimonials.author: Johan V.

testimonials.quote: We used Empire for our commercial warehouse roof. The team was on-site supervised, finished ahead of schedule and the quality is outstanding.
testimonials.author: Marinda S.

testimonials.quote: The asbestos encapsulation service is brilliant — no shutdown, no expensive removal, and we have a 10-year guarantee. Highly recommend.
testimonials.author: Deon K.

hero.headline: Cape Town's #1 Roofing & Waterproofing Specialists
hero.subheadline: Over a decade of expert roofing, waterproofing, and building envelope solutions. Backed by written guarantees on every job.

about.headline: Built for Cape Town's Toughest Weather
about.body: Empire Roofing has been protecting homes and businesses across the Western Cape for over a decade. From coastal winds in Bloubergstrand to heavy rains in the Boland, we build and repair roofs engineered to handle it all — backed by written workmanship guarantees on every job.
points: 2-year written workmanship guarantee on all repairs
OHS-compliant teams with full public liability cover
Serving Cape Town, West Coast & Boland regions
Team members employed by Empire for over a decade

process.title: Free Inspection
process.body: We visit your property at no cost, assess all roofing areas thoroughly and identify every issue — visible or hidden.

process.title: Written Quote
process.body: You receive a clear, written quote with full scope of work, recommended systems, inclusions, exclusions and timeline.

process.title: Expert Work
process.body: Our experienced, on-site supervised teams carry out the work using premium materials matched to your roof type and exposure.

process.title: Guaranteed
process.body: Final quality inspection, snag resolution and a written workmanship guarantee. Photo logs available on request.

faq.q: Do you provide a guarantee on your work?
faq.a: Yes. Empire Roofing provides a 2-year written workmanship guarantee on all completed repairs. Asbestos encapsulation carries a 10-year guarantee.

faq.q: Do you offer free inspections?
faq.a: Yes — all inspections are free of charge and same-day written quotes are available. Contact us via phone, email or WhatsApp.

faq.q: Can you handle both residential and commercial projects?
faq.a: Absolutely. Empire Roofing serves residential homeowners, sectional title complexes, commercial properties, industrial warehouses, schools and more.

faq.q: Is asbestos removal necessary?
faq.a: Not always. Our certified asbestos encapsulation service binds unstable fibres, prevents airborne spread and requires no shutdown — with a 10-year guarantee.

faq.q: Which areas do you serve?
faq.a: We operate across Greater Cape Town, up the West Coast to Langebaan and into the Boland. One call connects you to a local team.

services.title: Waterproofing
services.shortDesc: Concrete decks, parapet walls, box gutters & chimneys.
services.metaTitle: Waterproofing Cape Town — Roof, Deck & Wall Specialists
services.metaDesc: Professional waterproofing services in Cape Town. Flat roofs, balconies, walls & basements. Free inspection. 2-year guarantee.
points: 4mm heat fuse malthoid waterproofing for concrete decks
Parapet wall, box gutter & chimney waterproofing
Exterior wall, side & headwall flashing waterproofing

faq.q: What types of waterproofing do you offer in Cape Town?
faq.a: We offer torch-on malthoid, acrylic coating, polyurethane membrane, and spray-applied systems for flat roofs, decks, walls and below-ground structures.

faq.q: How long does waterproofing last?
faq.a: Our systems carry a 2-year workmanship guarantee. The underlying materials are rated 10–15 years depending on the system applied.

services.title: Roof Installations
services.shortDesc: New IBR, corrugated & tile roof installations.
services.metaTitle: Roof Installations Cape Town — Residential & Commercial
services.metaDesc: New roof installations in Cape Town. IBR, Chromadek, tile and flat roof systems. Free quote. 2-year guarantee.
points: New IBR, corrugated & Chromadek roof sheet installation
Roof tile replacement — concrete, clay & slate
All roof types: tiled, metal, flat & pitched

faq.q: What roof types do you install in Cape Town?
faq.a: We install IBR, corrugated, Chromadek, concrete tile, clay tile, slate and flat roof membrane systems for residential and commercial properties.

faq.q: How long does a new roof installation take?
faq.a: Most residential installations take 2–5 days depending on size and system. Commercial projects are scoped individually.

services.title: Roof Refurbishments
services.metaTitle: Roof Refurbishments Cape Town — Restore & Protect Your Roof
services.metaDesc: Full roof refurbishments in Cape Town. Replace worn sheets, treat rust, upgrade insulation. Free inspection. 2-year guarantee.

faq.q: When should I refurbish rather than replace my roof?
faq.a: If the structure is sound but sheets, fasteners and flashings are worn, a refurbishment extends life significantly at a fraction of replacement cost.

faq.q: Do you treat rust on metal roofs?
faq.a: Yes. We apply rust converters and anti-corrosion primers before any coating or sheet replacement to prevent recurrence.

services.title: Commercial & Industrial Roofing
services.shortDesc: Large-scale roofing for factories, warehouses & commercial properties.
services.metaDesc: Expert commercial and industrial roofing in Cape Town. Minimal downtime. OHS compliant. Free quote. 2-year guarantee.
points: Large-span IBR & box profile sheet installation
Schools, malls, petrol stations & business parks

faq.q: Can you work on occupied commercial buildings?
faq.a: Yes. We plan all commercial projects to minimise operational disruption and comply with full OHS requirements.

faq.q: Do you handle large industrial roof spans?
faq.a: Yes. We specialise in large-span IBR and box profile systems for factories, warehouses and industrial parks.

services.title: Aluminium Guttering
services.shortDesc: Rust-free aluminium gutters with 10-year corrosion guarantee.
services.metaTitle: Aluminium Guttering Cape Town — Rust-Free, 10-Year Guaranteed
services.metaDesc: Aluminium gutter installation in Cape Town. Rust-resistant, no sagging. 10-year corrosion guarantee. Free quote.

faq.q: Why choose aluminium gutters over PVC?
faq.a: Aluminium gutters are more durable, don't sag under Cape Town's heat, and carry a 10-year corrosion guarantee. They're the industry-leading choice for longevity.

faq.q: Do you clean and unblock existing gutters?
faq.a: Yes. We offer gutter cleaning, unblocking and repair as a standalone service or as part of a roof maintenance programme.

services.title: Construction & Painting
services.shortDesc: Full building maintenance, painting & construction services.
services.metaTitle: Construction & Painting Cape Town — Building Maintenance Specialists
services.metaDesc: Construction and painting services in Cape Town. Residential, commercial and industrial. Competitive pricing. Free quote.

faq.q: Do you do both interior and exterior painting?
faq.a: Yes. We handle all interior and exterior painting for residential homes, complexes, commercial properties and industrial buildings.

faq.q: Can you handle full building maintenance contracts?
faq.a: Yes. We manage maintenance contracts for body corporates, estates, schools, business parks and retail centres.

services.title: Asbestos Roof Refurbishments
services.metaTitle: Asbestos Roof Refurbishments Cape Town — Safe & Certified
services.metaDesc: Certified asbestos encapsulation in Cape Town. No removal required. 10-year guarantee. Safe, cost-effective solution.
points: Binds & seals unstable asbestos fibres permanently
Prevents airborne fibre spread — no health risk
No downtime or expensive shutdown required
Fraction of the cost vs full asbestos removal

faq.q: Is asbestos removal always necessary?
faq.a: No. If the asbestos sheeting is intact and not friable, our encapsulation system seals fibres permanently at a fraction of removal cost, with a 10-year guarantee.

faq.q: Is encapsulation safe?
faq.a: Yes. Our certified encapsulation process eliminates the risk of airborne fibre exposure without the disruption and cost of full removal.

services.title: Pergola Installations
services.metaTitle: Pergola Installations Cape Town — Custom Decking & Shade Structures
services.metaDesc: Custom pergola and deck installations in Cape Town. Residential and commercial. Written guarantee. Free quote.

faq.q: Do you build custom pergolas?
faq.a: Yes. We design and build custom pergola structures to your specifications for residential gardens, entertainment areas and commercial outdoor spaces.

faq.q: What decking materials do you use?
faq.a: We work with both timber and composite decking depending on your preference, budget and exposure to Cape Town's coastal climate.

services.title: Thatch Roof Tiles
services.shortDesc: Authentic thatch roof tiles for a natural aesthetic.
services.metaTitle: Thatch Roof Tiles Cape Town — Natural Aesthetic, Modern Protection
services.metaDesc: Thatch roof tile installations in Cape Town. Authentic look with engineered durability. Free quote. Written guarantee.

faq.q: Are thatch roof tiles durable?
faq.a: Yes. Modern thatch roof tiles combine the authentic aesthetic of thatch with engineered durability and waterproofing performance.

faq.q: Can you repair existing thatch roofs?
faq.a: Yes. We repair, re-thatch and upgrade existing thatch roofs as well as install new thatch tile systems.

services.title: Empire Roofing West Coast
services.metaTitle: Empire Roofing West Coast — Langebaan & Surrounds
services.metaDesc: Roofing and waterproofing on the West Coast. Langebaan, Saldanha, Vredenburg and surrounds. Free quote. 2-year guarantee.
services.guarantee: Same guarantees as Cape Town — written, backed & honoured
points: All roofing services available on the West Coast

faq.q: Do you serve the West Coast from Cape Town?
faq.a: Yes. Our West Coast division covers Langebaan, Saldanha Bay, Vredenburg, Paternoster and surrounding coastal communities.

faq.q: Are your West Coast guarantees the same as Cape Town?
faq.a: Yes. The same written workmanship guarantees apply across all our service areas including the West Coast.
